{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322070925A2C8E3EC50A1BD6A947B"}"},"total":1035},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7572543997005333310","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"哇，我发现了作者的一个小巧思[思考]江燃和白逾的名字刚好对应了一句诗:江碧鸟逾白，山青花欲燃[舔屏]我直接大吃特吃好吗[飞吻]
作者大大写的很好，继续期待[送心]
这个发现我真的超级激动，看看我，快夸我[大笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763122437,"group_id":"7534366390313045016","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+rj+trr84uqo4GgcTN7oP0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cfdf5dd6daf448779fbc49f0a7180f3d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707428&x-signature=0R96B5pP3ZvqHdMQMHdMq%2B91Y04%3D","user_id":"109990712416","user_name":"帅到被张起灵追杀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109990712416","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7534366390313045016","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统无女主+天才流+背景王炸+不扮猪吃虎+偏群像+青春物语+主角团无cp】
[我身为天才，异能多一点很正常吧？]
[什么大魔头，我这么帅肯定不是在说我]
[小开不算开！]
开局穿越，父母双亡，校花表白，江燃莫名觉得这个剧情有点熟悉。
不过一切的一切都在他得知自家的真实情况和觉醒异能后改变了。
[掠夺：被你杀死的目标，异能将归你所有]
自此，觉醒者界多了许多个传说。
“一人单挑两千新生”
“越界按着异兽爆锤”
“杀人后总司令亲自道歉”
“全球联赛断层第一”
“众多高等异能拥有者”
“本世纪最可怕的怪物”
...
面对记者的采访，江燃耸耸肩。
“什么怪物，什么大魔头，我不知道啊，反正我很帅。”
“嗯？怎样才能做到像我一样优秀？这个简单，只要更努力就好。”
——
开头偏经典，不喜欢看的可以跳过或退出，不要因为这个骂我了，谢谢。
主角配角均无cp无后宫无暧昧，不收女，不喜欢的也可以走了。
剧情均为本人认为的大众设定，如有雷同完全是因为我土鳖，尽量不要ky，谢谢。
最后祝你们天天开心生活愉快。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/377ce1e748e7f78e7316a657b8dc83e5","author":"好想变有钱人","author_id":"","book_id":"7534366390313045016","book_name":"别爱我，没结果，除非异能送我","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7534366567757267480","read_count":"61633","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"969323"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"443","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,天才,无女主,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/692549df91a30fff15a653d36e495a35~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318566&x-signature=IVzLgYyc4W5mZ5FV8wSXADJ9zOM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"99538432177","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"109"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322070925A2C8E3EC50A1BD6A947B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":472,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duratio
